description: Shillong, the charming capital of Meghalaya, is a nature lover’s paradise surrounded by rolling green hills, misty cliffs, crystal-clear waterfalls and serene lakes. Often called the Scotland of the East, Shillong offers a refreshing escape from city life with its cool climate, pine forests, music cafés, vibrant local culture and colonial-era charm. Whether you are admiring sweeping valley views from Shillong Peak, enjoying the musical vibes at Police Bazar, exploring gorgeous waterfalls like Elephant Falls, or simply relaxing by the calm waters of Umiam Lake — Shillong gives an unforgettable experience filled with nature, peace and soul-soothing beauty.

Any portage at airports and hotels, tips, insurance, wine, mineral water, telephone charges, and all items of personal nature. 		
Any services not specifically mentioned in the inclusions.

Anything Not mentioned in inclusions.

faqs.title: 1) What is the best time to visit Shillong?
faqs.content: March to June and October to December — pleasant weather & clear views.

faqs.title: 2) What are the main attractions in Shillong?
faqs.content: Umiam Lake, Shillong Peak, Elephant Falls, Police Bazar, Ward’s Lake, Don Bosco Museum, Laitlum Canyon.

faqs.title: 3) Can we cover Cherrapunji & Dawki in this trip?
faqs.content: Yes — can be added as a day trip (approx. 2 – 2.5 hours drive one way).

faqs.title: 4) What should we carry?
faqs.content: Warm clothes, comfortable shoes, rain jacket/umbrella (rain possible anytime), sunglasses & water bottle.
